objective: Cycle 92 — C122: CardOverlay 1/2/3 digit shortcuts + door panel z-fight polygonOffset

bugs_fixed: C122/CARD-KB-01 (MEDIUM-HIGH): CardOverlay had no digit key shortcuts — keyboard users had to Tab through options every card. Added document-level 1/2/3 handler (onDigitKey) in showCard(). Handler is declared with let+definite-assignment before safetyId so safety timeout can clean it up. Also cleaned up in activate() and self-removes on first valid keypress. Affects every card interaction in every run.

C122/DOOR-ZF-01 (MEDIUM): Door panel (doorMat, 0.15u thick) shared material with door frame pieces. Panel overlaps frame corners at z=4.0±0.25 and z=7.0±0.25 → z-fighting on 16-bit depth GPUs. Fix: clone doorMat for panel only, add polygonOffset(factor=-1, units=-2). Frame pieces keep original doorMat. panelMat is disposed by scene.traverse() Set dedup on lair dispose.
audit_summary.c122_verdict: CLEAR — digit shortcuts work for 1/2/3 card options. Door panel z-fight eliminated with polygonOffset. 0 TS errors.
c122_confirmations: CardOverlay: onDigitKey handler, cleaned up in activate() + safetyId + self on valid press
MerlinLairScene: panelMat = doorMat.clone() + polygonOffset(factor=-1, units=-2) on door panel only
Build: main=51.92KB gzip (+0.14KB), minigames=25.43KB gzip. 0 TS errors.
open_issues_deferred: LOW LAIR-01: No pause() API on LairResult.
LOW: potionBottles bloom (emissiveIntensity=0.25), stone elongation (InstancedMesh scale Y=5.33).
audit_summary.build: 0 TS errors, main=51.92KB gzip, minigames=25.43KB gzip
